name: The Planar Case of Thomas Positive Circuits Conjecture
summary: arXiv:2607.14143v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The notion of circuit refers to a cyclic oriented influence between the elements of a dynamical system. There are two classes of circuit: positive...
description: arXiv:2607.14143v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The notion of circuit refers to a cyclic oriented influence between the elements of a dynamical system. There are two classes of circuit: positive and negative. R. Thomas conjectured that a necessary condition of multi stationarity is the existence of positive circuits. In this paper we use dynamical system tools and planar analysis to find cond...
author: Natan Katz
